Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril shares the accessible and sustainable virtues of southern caviar.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril turns up the heat and turns the spotlight on Louisiana hot sauce!
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu, with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland, aka The Bronco Babe, grills up dishes to honor the state of Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: Emeril helps you wake up guests with coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp?
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Emeril makes Louisiana Bourbon the star ingredient in three recipes.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: Emeril is on a mission to bring back squab to the grill and to your plate!
Video.title: Bringing Back Squab

Video.summary: Emeril extols the benefits of grass-fed beef, then presents three recipes.
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates the flavorful Creole tomato, grown from rich soil of the Mississippi Delta.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: For your next get together, do it New Orleans-style with Emeril's traditional crawfish boil.
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Forget what you know about okra: Emeril makes okra outrageously good.
Video.title: Best Okra in Town

Video.summary: For a New York-style tailgate, indulge in some of New York City's Italian favorites.
Video.title: New York Jets

Video.summary: Detroit Lions superfan Michael Banks and his wife, Rona, turn to grilled Tailgating fare.
Video.title: Detroit

Video.summary: Emeril honors Wisconsin, the cheese capital of the US, with cheesy beer dips and soft pretzels.
Video.title: Green Bay

Video.summary: Emeril helps a 49ers superfan cook up some crowd-pleasing Bay Area seafood dishes.
Video.title: San Francisco

Video.summary: For a New York-style tailgate, keep it old school with Emeril's favorite deli inspired classics.
Video.title: New York Giants

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril helps Chicago Bears fan Edgar Mejia put a New Orleans spin on hotdogs and deep dish pizza.
Video.title: Chicago

Video.summary: Miami Dolphins superfan Seth Farmer and his girlfriend, Julia Thompson, inspire Emeril's tailgating creations.
Video.title: Miami

Video.summary: Emeril joins Cleveland Browns superfan Ray Prisby to cook up Ohio-inspired dishes.
Video.title: Cleveland

Video.summary: Emeril welcomes Pittsburgh Steelers superfan Brad Younkin; recipes inspired by Pittsburgh's Polish roots.
Video.title: Pittsburgh

Video.summary: At your next tailgate, go with a sure-fire southern menu of "meat and three."
Video.title: Tennessee Titans

Video.summary: For a Carolina-inspired tailgate, wow your guests with Emeril's take on some hometown faves.
Video.title: Carolina Panthers

Video.summary: Emeril makes ribeye's on the grill, spinach, baked potatoes, and four cheese mac in honor of Sin City.
Video.title: Las Vegas

Video.summary: Emeril prepares his favorite football menu. These are the dishes that Emeril serves to his family and friends!
Video.title: How Emeril Tailgates

Video.summary: Emeril's throws a Saints party with superfan Whistle Monsta at restaurant Meril in New Orleans.
Video.title: How New Orleans Tailgates

Video.summary: For a Texas-style tailgate, impress your guests with Emeril's take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.summary: Emeri's tailgate menu is inspirated by flavors (and favorite sandwiches) of Philadelphia.
